description_long: This kiosk is a compact, rectangular vending station with a prominent, colorful signboard on top, featuring both text and graphics. The front face displays two vending machine interfaces, each with a transparent window showing a variety of products inside, and a central payment terminal. The signboard is visually divided into two sections, with blue and orange backgrounds, and includes branding, promotional text, and a cheerful illustrated character. The sides of the kiosk are solid panels, each with additional branding and graphics, while the rear is a plain, solid surface with no openings or features. The kiosk sits on a circular wooden platform, suggesting a temporary or modular installation suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact vending kiosk with dual vending machines, a colorful signboard, and branded side panels, set on a circular wooden platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing two vending machines, a central payment terminal, and a large, colorful signboard with branding and graphics.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid panel with branding, graphics, and a partial view of the signboard above.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, solid back panel with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, with branding and graphics on the side panel and a partial view of the signboard.
attribute_signage_type: Printed signboard with branding, promotional text, and graphics, placed above the vending interfaces and on side panels; includes visible text such as 'ACQUISTA CASHLESS' and 'serim'.
attribute_window_presence: Two rectangular transparent windows on the front, integrated into the vending machine interfaces.
attribute_door_configuration: None visible; access likely from rear or internal panels not shown.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof, extends slightly beyond the kiosk body, constructed from solid panels with a large, upright signboard as a prominent feature.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern commercial with minimalist, functional design and bold, colorful branding elements.
